create_your_account_description: Join us today and experience the convenience of effortless parking at your fingertips. Sign up now to unlock a world of hassle-free parking solutions tailored just for you.
welcome_to_parking_app_description: Your ultimate parking solution. Discover, book, and manage parking spots effortlessly with our user-friendly app.
find_parking_spot_around_you_easily: Find parking spot around you easily
find_parking_spot_around_you_easily_desc: Locate nearby spots in seconds with real-time availability, prices, and directions. Filter by distance, price, type, or EV charging, and navigate straight to your space — no more circling the streets.
book_and_pay_parking_quickly_and_shortly: Book and pay parking quickly and shortly
Skip the hassle of searching and queuing — find available parking spots near you, reserve them in advance, and pay securely in just a few taps. Enjoy a fast, seamless parking experience every time.
expand_parking_time_as_you_need: Expand parking time as you need
expand_parking_time_as_you_need_descript: Running late or deciding to stay longer ? Easily extend your parking session right from your phone. No need to rush back to the meter — just add more time in seconds and keep your spot stress-free.
find_the_best_car_parking_spot: Find the best car parking spot
find_the_best_car_parking_spot_descripti: Discover the best parking options tailored to your needs. Whether you prefer convenience, cost-effectiveness, or proximity, our app helps you find the perfect spot every time.
check_email_verify_account: Please check your email to verify your account.
want_to_have_your_own_parking: Want to have your own parking ?
